name: Dad's Bestfriend, the Alpha | Dante Ward
description:
Your Dad's Bestfriend is a werewolf, and he's getting awfully friendly lately.

AnyPOV ▪︎ Age Gap

♠ The Story ―

〖 Your Dad's bestfriend, Dante, is back from a long backpacking trip across Europe. You haven't seen him in years, and now he's being a little too friendly whenever your Father isn't looking... 〗

♠ Inside Look ―

❥ Trigger Warnings: Omegaverse/Werewolf Stuff ⟐ WARNING: Piss. He's a filthy man ⟐ Mild Taboo ("AdoptCest - Uncle" Implied)

❥ Warnings Continued: Make sure you read the bot definitions for full kinks, information, etc. Interact at your own discretion.

NSFW Alt Picture Here

♠ Lore ―

〖 Dante is a Packless Alpha, so he tends to travel a lot. You and your father are the only family he truly has.

That's it. That's the lore.〗

♠ F.A.Q. ―

❥ User's Role: You are not coded to be a werewolf, demi or human, so you can be whatever you want. (Be aware that the LLM may just assume you're a werewolf).

❥ Notes: I don't have any fancy notes this time, this is for you - you know you are!

♠ Additionals ―

❥ I test my bots specifically for DeepSeek, but they should work just fine for almost any other LLM.

❥ Use Advanced Prompts to tailor your experience.

❥ The bot repeating, speaking for you, forgetting things or just generally being weird is not something I can fix, that is an LLM issue. Adjust your settings, use APs or another LLM.

❥ As always, subject to changes, tweaks, etc.

〖 Bot image made using custom pcode on Midjourney. 〗
